name: Chequessett Club
about: Chequessett Club is a multi-sport and social club located in Wellfleet, Massachusetts, on Cape Cod. The venue features a 9-hole semi-links golf course with dual tees for an 18-hole round, alongside amenities for tennis, pickleball, and sailing. The club operates a golf simulator for members and their guests, with booking handled through a member portal. It functions as a full-service country club with a focus on providing a recreational and social atmosphere, complete with food and beverage options and event hosting capabilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to a high-end golf simulator with flexible tee time booking
Scenic waterfront location overlooking Wellfleet Bay providing a tranquil atmosphere
Full club amenities including dining, event spaces, and other recreational activities like tennis and pickleball

food_and_drink.notes: Daily lunch options and grab & go breakfast available.
Full bar available at the Bayside Bar & Grille.

simulator_hardware.notes: Brand and model not specified in the provided content.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content does not specify if club rental is available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the club offers daily lunch options and grab & go breakfast, and has a full bar with handcrafted cocktails.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take on the simulator?
faq.answer: The content does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulator round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the club offers youth programs including Kids Camp and Youth Amenities, making it a family-friendly environment.
